docblock.description: Marker is default caracter to parsing
Constructor, create in instance of this class.
Adding a new character for parsing
Replace value from template with value from input
Using the results of the input replace the contents of template values
Determines information about the current platform the application is running on

(c) Eko Dedy Purnomo <eko.dedy.purnomo@gmail.com>
For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE file that was distributed with this source code.

Validate value with regex as a tester.
Example: ```php $validator = new Roulette\validation\validator\Format( '/foo/', '"{value}" does not pass the test.' ); $validator->test('bar'); // return `false` $validator->getMessage(); // return `"bar" does not pass the test` ```

tag.name: return
tag.description: true if the variable is valid

docblock.description: \Rouletet\field\Value represent a single value of the field, its not so simply for a value, but it has several purpose of a field value.
docblock.long-description:
There are two options for set the value: - setOriginal: Apply for original value, means value is real value from database, value (will `default` value if is `null`) will be processed by `read`. - setValue: Apply for user value, means value are set by user/program and may be different from real value in database, for example user load a record and in field `gender` has a value `male`, then user set a new value for it as `female`, so value in setValue will be different with setOriginal because use doesnt save the record yet.
Value lifecycle
+-->--{writer}-->-----------------------------------{=>} ++++++++++++ | | DATABASE | +--<--{reader}--<--{default}--<---------------------{<=} ++++++++++++ | | +-->-----[original]-->------------------------------{=>} isModified() | | | +-->--+-->--+ | | | | {commit} {revert} | | | | +--<--+--<--+ | | +-->-------[raw]-->--{renderer}-->--[display]-->----{=>} get() | +--<--{validation}--<--{converter}--<--{<=} set()
Points: - Read data from database 1. If value from database are not defined (or column inexist) then `default` value will be applied 2. Value will be processed by `reader` 3. Then Value saved into `raw` 4. Then Value copied into `original` within `commit` is true (mean value is valid from database) 5. `Render` will be called and the result saved into `display` - Getter 1. By default will return the `display` value, or `raw` instead if `render=false` - Setter 1. Passed value will be converted by the `converter` 2. Then (converted) value value goes into `validation` 3. Then (converted) value will be saved into raw, though the value is valid or not - Any changes 1. Modified status is equality of raw (set by user/program) and original (value based on database) 2. `Commit` will force original value to be equal with raw, so will affect modified is false

docblock.description: Will display the details of this field
Will display on the table where the field was taken
Featuring the original value of the DB
Temporary storage prior to DB, the value is the same as the original
Will show a record of the field
Valid will check whether the field is true
Will display the error message for the field value
Take a Record from the fields by value on params
Take a record by writer on DB
Shortcut to set the real value from database.
Taking the original value of the DB, before update
Set a value to a Raw in field
Shortcut to setRaw, can use this function
Taking the value of this field

tag.name: param
tag.description: default section is display, you can choose the section ['display', 'raw', original]

docblock.description: Taking the value of the field, specified by the parameter, if true for display or false for raw data
Ascertain whether the field has been changed
Retrieve messages from an application error
Ascertain whether the field is passed the validation test
Provide validation of the data entered and check whether the same original data
Choosing the new data from the old data and insert it into DB
Returns the value of the temporary storage to its original value
Convert the data from the DB, so that is displayed is the manipulation of data from the server
Determines information about the current platform the application is running on
This file is part of the Roulette package.
docblock.long-description:
(c) Eko Dedy Purnomo <eko.dedy.purnomo@gmail.com>
For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE file that was distributed with this source code.

docblock.description: Is a class for helps in manipulating array in a single object.
Check whether the items is empty or not

tag.name: return
tag.description: true if there is no item in the collection

docblock.description: Get an item in the collection specified by the key.

tag.name: param
tag.description: use number or string to get it by index, array to get it by the value

docblock.description: Get the number of item in the collection
Get the key of the items in the collection
Get the values of the items in the collection
Get all items in the collection
Get the item from the collection in array format
Get the items from the collection in JSON format
Sets key with the new value.
Sets key with the new value. If only the key is already defined in collection.
Sets key with the new value. If only the key is not defined in collection.
Add one or more item to the collection.
docblock.long-description: Example: ```php $coll = new Collection(); $coll->add('John'); // will be saved into collection with numeric key $coll->add(true, 1, 'some value'); // all passed arguments will be saved too ```

docblock.description: Adds all elements of an Array or an Object to the collection.
Set collection items into an empty array.
Set value to `null` on each items
Remove null item on the Collection
Check existense of item in the collection

tag.name: param
tag.description: Set true will compare with === operator and == otherwise

docblock.description: Check if one or more of the anymatch are in the Collection

tag.name: param
tag.description: Set true will compare with === operator and == otherwise

docblock.description: Check item has a Key are in the collection
Check whether the item in the collection has the specified key
CHeck whether item in the collection has the specified item
Get the first item in the collection
Get the last item in the collection
Calculates the sum of items in the Collection.
Returns average value from the Collection.
Returns the maximum value in the Collection.
Returns the minimum value in the Collection.
Return the generate sorting results from items
Return the randomize results from items
Apply an invoker function to all value.
docblock.long-description: Each return value will be replaced for the old.

docblock.description: Calls the passed function for each element in this composite.
Check each callback must be true.
Delete records if the record is not included in the if
Delete records from the conditions on the record
Deleting records based on conditions in
Delete a record with the parameter by
Its kinda map but changed items will be set into the Collection replacing the old.
Determines information about the current platform the application is running on
This file is part of the Roulette package.

For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE file that was distributed with this source code.

docblock.description: actions to be taken by the application
create a function with the number of parameters that can change
notification that an action has been successful
notification that an action has occurred error
Rows that affected by last operation
The reququired time to execute the operation
the process of processing data to be sent to DB
Get the records from the operation
Check whether the operation is a success
Check Whether the operation is ececuted or not
function performs a process with database
function sends that an action has been successful
function sends that an action has failed
function displays a notification after the previous effect
Determines information about the current platform the application is running on

docblock.description: Provide any function for iterable (array or object) variable
Filtering the variable to match the requirement
Check if variable is iterable (array or object)
docblock.long-description:
Example: \Roulette\Iterator::isIterable(array(1,2,3)); // true
\Roulette\Iterator::isIterable('hello world'); // false

tag.name: return
tag.description: true if the variable is iterable

docblock.description: Check if variable is associative array
docblock.long-description:
Example: \Roulette\Iterator::isAssoc(array(1,2,3)); // false
\Roulette\Iterator::isAssoc(array('a'=>1,'b'=>2,3)); // true
\Roulette\Iterator::isAssoc(array('1'=>1,'2'=>2,'3'=>3)); // false

tag.name: return
tag.description: if the variable is association array

docblock.description: Get a valid defined value in an array if value doesnt defined so it will return default value
docblock.long-description:
Example: \Roulette\Iterator::enum('a',array('a','b')); // return 'a'
\Roulette\Iterator::enum('c',array('a','b')); // return null
\Roulette\Iterator::enum('c',array('a','b'),'d'); // return 'd'

docblock.description: Iterate every key on Iterable value given

tag.name: param
tag.description: indicate if iteration going to be reversed mode

docblock.description: fill an Iterable with given value on its key/property in defined list

tag.name: param
tag.description: value to fill each defined key/property on list

docblock.description: fill an Iterable with given value on its key/property in defined list if key/property is not exist
docblock.long-description:
Example: \Roulette\Iterator::fillKey( array(), array('a','b'), '5' ); // return array('a'=>'5', 'b'=>'5')
\Roulette\Iterator::fillKey( array('a'=>null), array('a','b'), '5' ); // return array('a'=>null, 'b'=>'5')

tag.name: param
tag.description: value to fill each defined key/property on list

docblock.description: fill an iterable with given value on its key/property in defined list if key/property is exist
Filter field with the key if exist
Copies all the properties of config to the iterable object
docblock.long-description:
Example: \Roulette\Iterator::apply( array(), array('a'=>5,'b'=>'B') ); // return array('a'=>5, 'b'=>'B')
\Roulette\Iterator::apply( array('a'=>4), array('a'=>5,'b'=>'B') ); // return array('a'=>5, 'b'=>'B')

tag.name: param
tag.description: create and iterable object if $source isnt iterable

docblock.description: Copies all the properties of config to the iterable object if key/properties doesnt exist
Copies all the properties of config to the iterable object if key/properties exist
Copies all the properties of config to the iterable object if key/properties doesn't exist
get all value by defined keys to take
docblock.long-description: Example: \Roulette\Iterator::take( array('a'=>5,'b'=>'B'), array('a') ); // return array('a'=>5)

tag.name: param
tag.description: list of keys to get the value

docblock.description: transform the value by the replacer.
transform the key by the replacer.
get all match key from array within matcher array.
docblock.long-description:
Example: $source = array( 'a'=>'A', 'b'=>'B', 'c'=>null, 'd'=>false );
$matchs = \Roulette\Iterator::match( $source, array('a','b') ); // return: array('a'=>'B','b'=>'B')
$matchs = \Roulette\Iterator::match( $source, array('a','b','c','d') ); // return: array('a'=>'B','b'=>'B','d'=>false)
$matchs = \Roulette\Iterator::match( $source, array('a','b','c','d'), true ); // return: array('a'=>'B','b'=>'B','c'=>null,'d'=>false)
$matchs = \Roulette\Iterator::match( $source, array('h') ); // return: array()
$matchs = \Roulette\Iterator::match( $source, array('h'), true, true ); // return: array('h'=>null)
$matchs = \Roulette\Iterator::match( $source, array('h'), true, true, 5 ); // return: array('h'=>5)

tag.name: param
tag.description: Source array that will be get the match

tag.name: param
tag.description: Array list of match key to fetch

tag.name: param
tag.description: Set false to ignored an item in source if value is null, default:true

tag.name: param
tag.description: Set true to give a default value if key doesnt exist, default:false

tag.name: param
tag.description: Default value to give in property doesn exist, it only used if $all_variable is true, default:null

docblock.description: A Model represents a record from database as an object, that have many crud operation function, including association.
Indicate if record is exist on the database
Get the name of table from DB that associated to the model
Set the table name to assocate the model from DB
Get the primary field of the model
Set the primary field of the model
Get the model that associated with
Get the model that associated with specified by the association name
Get the field name in the model specified by the name
Check whether the model have the specified field
Rename the field of the model
Rename the existing field with the specified name
Get the fields of the model
Get the attribute for every fields in the model
Get the attribute from a specified field
Get the name of the fields of the model
Get the source fields of the model
Get the displayed fields of the model
Find fields of the model that specified by the condition of the parameter
Find the field that have the private property being set to true from the model
Find the field that have the privet property being set to false from the model
Find fields that have property insert being set to true
Find fields that have property update being set to true
Find field that have the property select being set to true
Find field that have the property delete being set to true
Check the record whether it's modified or not
Get the modified field from the record
Check the record whether it's valid or not
Check whether the record is exist in the database or not force recheck will not affect any changes on database into object or vise versa, it will only validate if id is exist.
Check the record if it has id
Get the primary field of the record
Set the value for the primary fiel dof the model
an existing record or new record on the model
Set the value of the record by specified name
get the record from the specified field name
Get the record from the model
Check the record is valid or not
Destroy a record from the database
Get the record/s of associated model
Get the records of associated model
Determines information about the current platform the application is running on
This file is part of the Roulette package.
docblock.long-description:
(c) Eko Dedy Purnomo <eko.dedy.purnomo@gmail.com>
For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE file that was distributed with this source code.

docblock.description: Field is part of the model, which is used to declare a field of that model
The name of field by which for references.
Name of field from database to access.
String to output for message and another user text purpose.
Accessibility for getData in model, private is `true` will be ignored for append on it.
Define if field is puphet will be ignore for insert/update operation.
Readonly is `true` will be effect on field as readonly
Default value for first initializing data in the Model.
Make field will be insert on DB, if insert `false` field not be insert on DB
Field will be update on DB "Default value is true", if update `false` field can't be update
Field can be delete from DB "Default value is true", if delete `false` field can't be delete
Default value select is true, if select `false` so field can't be select
writer will enter the field to DB
reader will read Field from DB field
Default value converter is null, can be filled with an array
Default value renderer is null. renderer can be use for field ex: gender->render to Male or boolean
Field will be vatidate from DB is same on record
__construct for function creates a new object field.
Method allows a class to decide how it will react when it is treated like a string.
docblock.long-description: Converting objects without __toString() method to string would cause E_RECOVERABLE_ERROR

docblock.description: Take specified Default value from Field
Field can only view if field isReadOnly is true
See what the field can be Update/Insert
See what the field is Private or not
See what the field is Public or not
View the status field, can be select or not
View the status field, can be insert or not
View the status field, can be update or not
View the status field, can be delete or not
Read this field by params value
Render will reverse field from its original value
Validate fields that will be processed
Take the validation to be processed
Merge its config with parent config.
docblock.long-description: this will merge the parent config into it from parent config, this method better to use in merge some config within value is array

tag.name: param
tag.description: a set of configuration to be applied to the class

docblock.description: Configure class using passed arguments (Array necessaries)
Sorthand for getConfig if pass one argument.
docblock.long-description: Sorthand for setConfig if pass two or more arguments.

tag.name: return
tag.description: Value depend on the arguments passed

tag.name: param
tag.description: Value to be set into the property

tag.name: param
tag.description: merge config with its existing config, used if existing value is array

docblock.description: Determines information about the current platform the application is running on
This file is part of the Roulette package.
docblock.long-description:
(c) Eko Dedy Purnomo <eko.dedy.purnomo@gmail.com>
For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE file that was distributed with this source code.

docblock.description: Proxy class is used for database operation, it operate SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE.
Set to true to keep operation logged
Tunnel to be used by operation to communicate with DB
Tunnel for the framework that being used
Framework that being used by the server application
Get the model that being used
Get the framework that being used as a server application
Get the tunnel of the framework that being used
Set the tunnel from framework that being used, to the proxy
Get the tunnel that being used by the proxy
Get the last added operation of the proxy

tag.name: param
tag.description: False to return as Object instead of Array, default true

tag.name: return
tag.description: Object if $result_array is true, Array otherwise, Boolean false if operation raise an error.

tag.name: param
tag.description: Select config. Config can be contain: fields@Array|String, filters@Array|String, sorter@Array|String, limit@Integer, start@Integer, result_array@Boolean

tag.name: return
tag.description: Object if $config['result_array'] is true, Array otherwise, Boolean false if operation raise an error.

docblock.description: Operate select to database, but only retrieve first record if success.
docblock.long-description: Shorthand for select with limit = 1, so there is no different in config.

tag.name: return
tag.description: Object if $config['result_array'] is true, Array otherwise, Boolean false if operation raise an error.

docblock.description: update data to be sent to DB
the process of deleting data on DB
Get number of existense record in the database with condition.
Determines information about the current platform the application is running on
This file is part of the Roulette package.

docblock.description: Helper can assist in using this roulette there is a shortcut, among others.
docblock.long-description: call(), each(), apply(), applyIf() Where without having to call its parent class

docblock.description: Create an alias of function and return it as a function.
create an alias of function with a new function name

docblock.description: Assosiation was a description of a relationship between a model one with the other models which in this function there-many relationship model or one model
Type of the Association only hasMany | hasOne
Foreign field of the associated model
the Name of the model that being associated with
get the Name fo the Association
get the Type of the Association
get the name of the model that being Associated with
get the foreign field of the assocaited model
Get record/s from the model that being associated with
Merge its config with parent config.
docblock.long-description: this will merge the parent config into it from parent config, this method better to use in merge some config within value is array

tag.name: param
tag.description: a set of configuration to be applied to the class

docblock.description: Configure class using passed arguments (Array necessaries)
Sorthand for getConfig if pass one argument.
docblock.long-description: Sorthand for setConfig if pass two or more arguments.

tag.name: return
tag.description: Value depend on the arguments passed

tag.name: param
tag.description: Value to be set into the property

tag.name: param
tag.description: merge config with its existing config, used if existing value is array

docblock.description: Determines information about the current platform the application is running on

docblock.description: ##Observable A class inherit to \Roulette\Base will be able to has one or more events
Array of listeners in this class
Array of event to be captured
Event capturing status, `false` mean disable event capturing

tag.name: param
tag.description: Event name or an Array event listener pairs

tag.name: param
tag.description: Listener (reference to the listener) to be removed from event listeners

docblock.description: Trigger an event to be executed

tag.name: param
tag.description: Array of arguments will pass to listeners

tag.name: return
tag.description: `true` if the listeners executed, `false` if the listeners return false

docblock.description: Fire the specified event with the passed parameter list
Add one or more events to the events list

tag.name: param
tag.description: String event name or array of events name

tag.name: return
tag.description: Added events, registered event will not returned

docblock.description: Check if an event is already exist.
Remove event from its events capturing

tag.name: param
tag.description: A name of event to be remove from its object

docblock.description: Check if class using events capturing (is enabled or not)

tag.name: param
tag.description: A name of event to be enabled

docblock.description: Get enabled status of an event.

tag.name: return
tag.description: Disabled status, return `false` if event doesnt exist

tag.name: param
tag.description: A name of event to be enabled

docblock.description: Get disabled status of an event.

tag.name: return
tag.description: Disabled status, return `true` if event doesnt exist

docblock.description: Add listener on one or more events will add event if event doesnt exist on event list

tag.name: param
tag.description: Event name or an Array event listener pairs

docblock.description: Remove attached listener from event listeners if listener attaced on any events, it will be removed too unless the $eventName is described

tag.name: param
tag.description: Listener (reference to the listener) to be removed from event listeners

docblock.description: Remove attached listener from event listeners if listener attaced on any events, it will be removed too unless the $eventName is described
Check if an event has one or more listeners return `false` if event doesn't exist
This file is part of the Roulette package.
docblock.long-description:
(c) Eko Dedy Purnomo <eko.dedy.purnomo@gmail.com>

docblock.description: Class Tunnel\Definer for defining the framework that being used.
Default value if framework not identified

docblock.description: SubClass for Validator, will be show message "value should be a string"
docblock.long-description: Any validator classes should extend it for standart Roulette Validator.

tag.name: return
tag.description: true if the variable is valid

docblock.description: Get message with custom applied data.
docblock.long-description: Could be used after value fail the `test()`

docblock.description: Determines information about the current platform the application is running on
